observed_anomaly_cues: Surface irregularity consistent with molding or tufting fault
Visual pattern suggesting visible manufacturing defect
Localized deviation from normal toothbrush appearance
mechanism_explanation: Injection molding or bristle tufting process malfunction.
defect_region: on the toothbrush head or handle
severity_visual_description: moderate visible manufacturing defect visible under inspection lighting
corrective_action: Inspect mold cavities and adjust injection parameters.
counterfactual_prediction: After correction, the visible manufacturing defect would be absent and surface appears normal.
